title: Submit the completed intake and reach the thank-you page
description: This verifies that a client can complete the full intake and submit it successfully to reach the post-submission confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Complete the mental health assessment step
Complete the lifestyle context step
Continue through the documents step
Submit the completed intake
Verify the thank-you page is displayed

title: Complete the full intake and reach the thank-you page
description: This verifies that a new client can accept the contract, complete every required step in order, submit the intake, and land on the thank-you page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses
Complete the basic medical history step with valid responses
Complete the health evaluations step with valid responses
Complete the mental health assessment step with valid responses
Complete the lifestyle context step with valid responses
Continue through the documents step without adding files
Submit the completed intake
Verify the thank-you page is displayed
Verify the intake completion confirmation is visible

title: Accept the coaching contract and enter the intake
description: This verifies that a new client can review the contract, accept it, and proceed into the intake flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Verify the next intake step is displayed

title: Progress through the contract gate only after accepting
description: This verifies that accepting the contract is required before the intake flow can proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Review the contract
Accept the contract to start the intake
Verify the objectives step is displayed
Verify the contract screen is no longer displayed

title: Prevent skipping ahead without required inputs
description: This verifies that required-step gating keeps a client from advancing past incomplete sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Attempt to continue without completing the required objectives inputs
Verify the current step remains blocked and validation feedback is shown

title: Reject the coaching contract and exit the intake
description: This verifies that a new client can reject the contract and leave the intake flow without progressing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reject the coaching service contract
Verify the intake flow is exited

title: Complete objectives and continue to personal data
description: This verifies that a client can select goals, set commitment, choose prior coaching experience, and move to the personal data step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Select one or more motivation goals
Adjust the commitment level
Select prior coaching experience
Set a target date for the goals
Continue to the next step
Verify the personal data step is displayed

title: Complete the objectives step and move forward
description: This verifies that a client can provide goals, motivation, commitment, prior coaching experience, and target date, then continue to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Continue to the personal data step
Verify the personal data step is displayed
Verify the objectives step is completed

title: Complete personal data and continue to medical history
description: This verifies that a client can enter personal and demographic information and proceed to the basic medical step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Fill in the name field with a unique value
Fill in the contact details with valid values
Fill in the demographic and background fields with valid values
Continue to the next step
Verify the basic medical step is displayed

title: Complete personal data with optional photo skipped
description: This verifies that a client can enter identity and contact details, skip the optional photo when available, and continue to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses and skip the optional photo
Continue to the basic medical history step
Verify the basic medical history step is displayed
Verify the personal data step is completed

title: Upload a profile photo from personal data
description: This verifies that a client can optionally upload a profile photo and see it added before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Fill in the personal data fields with valid values
Upload a valid profile photo
Verify the uploaded photo is shown in the personal data step

title: Upload medical documents and continue without files
description: Verifies a client can reach the documents step, upload optional medical files, see them listed, and continue whether or not files are added.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Complete the mental health assessment step
Complete the lifestyle context step
Add a valid medical document through the upload control
Add a second valid medical document through drag and drop
Continue to the next step
Verify the uploaded document list is displayed
Verify the intake proceeds to the final review step

title: Upload medical documents and see them listed
description: This verifies that a client can add one or more medical documents on the documents step and see the uploaded file list before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses
Complete the basic medical history step with valid responses
Complete the health evaluations step with valid responses
Complete the mental health assessment step with valid responses
Complete the lifestyle context step with valid responses
Add one or more medical documents on the documents step
Continue to the next step
Verify the uploaded document list is displayed
Verify the flow can continue past the documents step

title: Upload medical documents and continue
description: This verifies that a client can add medical documents, see them listed, and continue without blocking progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Complete the mental health assessment step
Complete the lifestyle context step
Upload a valid medical document by clicking or dragging it into the upload area
Continue to the next step
Verify the uploaded document is listed and the intake advances

title: Complete mental health assessment and continue
description: Verifies a client can answer the mental health questionnaire and advance to the lifestyle context step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Answer all multiple-choice wellbeing questions
Write responses about feelings, support systems, and stress management
Continue to the next step
Verify the lifestyle context assessment step is displayed

title: Complete lifestyle context with routine and exercise preferences
description: This verifies that a client can describe routines, cooking, activity, limitations, gym access, preferred exercises, and available exercise time before continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses
Complete the basic medical history step with valid responses
Complete the health evaluations step with valid responses
Complete the mental health assessment step with valid responses
Complete the lifestyle context step with valid responses
Continue to the documents step
Verify the documents step is displayed
Verify the lifestyle context step is completed

title: Complete the basic medical history and continue
description: This verifies that a client can enter basic medical history information and move forward in the intake.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Fill in the basic medical history fields with valid values
Continue to the next step
Verify the health evaluations step is displayed

title: Complete all health evaluation answers and continue
description: Verifies a client can answer the full health evaluations questionnaire and advance to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Answer all frequency-based health questions for the seven health domains
Select yes, no, or maybe for each evaluation item
Continue to the next step
Verify the mental health assessment step is displayed

title: Move through basic medical history after entering valid information
description: This verifies that a client can complete the basic medical history step and reach the health evaluations step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses
Complete the basic medical history step with valid responses
Continue to the health evaluations step
Verify the health evaluations step is displayed
Verify the basic medical history step is completed

title: Submit detailed mental health responses and proceed
description: Verifies a client can complete the mental health step with open-ended responses and continue successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Provide complete responses for the mental health assessment questions
Continue to the next step
Verify the lifestyle context assessment step is displayed

title: Complete health evaluations across domains and continue
description: This verifies that a client can answer the health evaluations questionnaire across the listed domains and proceed to mental health assessment.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Answer the health evaluation questions across the domains
Continue to the next step
Verify the mental health assessment step is displayed

title: Complete the health evaluations questionnaire
description: This verifies that a client can answer the health evaluations across the required domains and continue to the mental health assessment.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the contract to start the intake
Complete the objectives step with valid responses
Complete the personal data step with valid responses
Complete the basic medical history step with valid responses
Complete the health evaluations step with valid responses
Continue to the mental health assessment step
Verify the mental health assessment step is displayed
Verify the health evaluations step is completed

title: Choose mixed evaluation responses and proceed
description: Verifies a client can complete the health evaluations step using a mix of response types and continue forward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Provide mixed yes, no, and maybe answers across the health evaluation domains
Continue to the next step
Verify the mental health assessment step is displayed

title: Complete the lifestyle context assessment and continue
description: This verifies that a client can provide lifestyle, exercise, and environment details and proceed to documents.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Complete the basic medical history step
Complete the health evaluations step
Complete the mental health assessment step
Fill in the lifestyle context fields with valid values
Continue to the next step
Verify the documents step is displayed

title: Record a minimal complaint and proceed
description: Verifies a client can complete the basic medical history step with only the essential complaint information and continue forward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Accept the coaching service contract
Complete the objectives step
Complete the personal data step
Fill in the main complaint with a concise description including intensity, impact, and duration
Continue to the next step
Verify the next intake step is displayed

title: Reach the intake exit path by rejecting the contract
description: Verifies a visitor can reject the service contract and exit the intake flow without entering the form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reject the coaching service contract
Verify the intake flow does not progress
